name: The Auditor's Notebook
panel_verdict: PASS WITH FIXES — locked as Studio Zero brand v1. Halo focus-ring + link-token fixes applied in v0.1.1.

ink-3.role: DECORATION-ONLY: hairline labels, decorative metadata. Not for body text. Large-text AA only.

warm.role: Editorial flourish on italicized phrases; PASS verdict framing; never used as button fill

focus._note: Focus tokens v0.1.1 — added per Halo HC1.4.11/HC2.4.13. The default --line-3 focus ring failed at 1.80:1 on bg-0. These tokens replace it.

ring.role: Focus ring on inputs, buttons, links, cards. Reuses ink-2 — 6.8:1 on bg-0, well above SC 1.4.11 3:1 minimum.

ring_emphasis.role: Focus ring on destructive / high-stakes actions (delete account, revoke key). Reuses ink-0 — 18.4:1 on bg-0.

focus.style_spec: 2px solid var(--focus-ring); outline-offset: 2px; border-radius: inherit. Per SC 2.4.13: focus indicator is not adjacent-color-only; ring + offset together provide ≥3:1 contrast against both bg and adjacent content.

link._note: Link tokens v0.1.1 — added per Halo SC 1.4.1 risk (Direction A v0.1.0 had no link token).

default.role: Link text color. Reuses ink-1 — 13.7:1 on bg-0. Underline is mandatory per SC 1.4.1 (color is never the only differentiator).

visited.role: Visited link. Reuses --warm. 11.4:1 on bg-0. Underline still applies.

verdict._note: Verdict colors are PRD-locked (§7.2 Step D). Brand cannot compete with verdict colors — these are reserved.

pass-with-fixes.role: PASS WITH FIXES verdict background; reserved.

severity._note: Severity tags as rendered in the rubric strip. Already specified in styles.css §rubric-row.

_contrast_pairs._method: WCAG 2.2 relative luminance; computed against sRGB hex values; AA body = 4.5:1, AA large = 3:1, AAA body = 7:1

ink-3_on_bg-0._use: Large text (>=18.66px regular or >=14px bold) or non-text UI components only. Forbidden for body copy. Canon must enforce.

ink-3_on_bg-1._use: Same restriction as ink-3 on bg-0.

serif.role: Display only — italicized phrases inside H1/H2; verdict-screen headlines; editorial pull-quotes. Never body.

sans.role: All headings (default), all body, all buttons.

mono.role: Metadata, numeric data, code, eyebrows, status chips, severity tags, navigation labels.

mono-meta.use: Eyebrows, status chips, navigation labels. UPPERCASE.

typography.italic_phrase_rule: Only italicized phrases inside H1 or H2 may switch to Instrument Serif. The italic carries the editorial register; never make a whole headline italic-serif.

radius._rule: 6px is the geometric default. 14px is reserved for cards (mode cards, gate stage, CTA strip). 999px (pill) for chips and CTAs. No other radii allowed.

motion._compliance: WCAG 2.2 SC 2.3.3 Animation from Interactions — all motion respects prefers-reduced-motion media query. WCAG 2.2 SC 2.2.2 — no auto-playing motion >5s without pause control.

prefers_reduced_motion.rule: All durations collapse to <=100ms. Marquee stops. Ring pulse stops. Cursor glow stops. Reveal animation collapses to fade-in only, no translate.
prefers_reduced_motion.implementation: @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { *, *::before, *::after { animation-duration: 0.01ms !important; animation-iteration-count: 1 !important; transition-duration: 0.01ms !important; scroll-behavior: auto !important; } }

elevation._note: Direction A is a near-flat brand. Elevation lives in hairlines and grain, not drop-shadow.

grain._use: Page-wide fixed overlay, pointer-events: none, z-index: 1

verdict_surface._note: Verdict screens follow PRD §7.2 Step D — color + icon + text. Brand provides framing only.
verdict_surface.fail_frame: 1px solid #5a2828 on bg-0; FAIL background #C8421A is the chip itself
verdict_surface.pwf_frame: 1px solid #5a3f1e on bg-0; PASS WITH FIXES background #E4C875 is the chip itself
verdict_surface.pass_frame: 1px solid var(--line-3) on bg-0; PASS background #14C8CC is the chip itself; warm accent permitted as supporting flourish on PASS state only

wcag_2_2_compliance._note: WCAG 2.2 new Success Criteria specs added v0.1.1 per Halo Phase 2 audit. Maps to PRD §14.6.
wcag_2_2_compliance.SC_1_4_3_Contrast_Minimum: All body-text + bg pairs in _contrast_pairs clear 4.5:1; large text clears 3:1. ink-3 and line-3 are forbidden for body copy.
wcag_2_2_compliance.SC_1_4_11_Non_text_Contrast: Focus ring (--focus-ring at 6.8:1 on bg-0) ✓. Card borders (--line-1 at 1.2:1) acceptable as decorative hairlines but NOT load-bearing affordances. Interactive borders use --line-2 minimum.
wcag_2_2_compliance.SC_1_4_10_Reflow: Token system supports 320 CSS px reflow. wrap_padding_x_mobile (20px) + body (15px / 1.55 line-height) verified. Section padding y_mobile (96px) reflows cleanly.
wcag_2_2_compliance.SC_1_4_12_Text_Spacing: Line-height + letter-spacing + paragraph-spacing tokens support user override; no fixed-height containers around prose. Spec'd in typography.scale.
wcag_2_2_compliance.SC_2_4_11_Focus_Not_Obscured_Minimum: Sticky nav (max 60px height) MUST NOT obscure focused inputs. Implementation: scroll-padding-top: 80px on html; focus-within in nav triggers explicit transform.
wcag_2_2_compliance.SC_2_4_13_Focus_Appearance: Focus ring spec: 2px solid + 2px offset = 4px total visible perimeter. Adjacent-color-only fail prevented by offset rule (offset_px=2 guarantees ring contrast against both bg AND adjacent content).
wcag_2_2_compliance.SC_2_5_7_Dragging_Movements: Findings list reorder + severity-bucket drag interactions: must provide a non-drag alternative (keyboard reorder + 'Move to…' menu). Spec'd in IA phase (Optic).
wcag_2_2_compliance.SC_2_5_8_Target_Size_Minimum: Interactive controls: 24×24 CSS px minimum. spacing scale guarantees no spacing-token combination produces sub-24px targets when used per usage-rules.md. Icon buttons must reserve 24×24 hit area even if visual is smaller.
wcag_2_2_compliance.SC_3_3_7_Redundant_Entry: Multi-step forms (signup, BYOK setup, project intake) must not re-prompt previously-entered info. Email entered at signup auto-fills downstream forms.
wcag_2_2_compliance.SC_3_3_8_Accessible_Authentication_Minim: API key paste field: accepts paste; supports password manager; show/hide toggle keyboard-operable; never blocks paste; no CAPTCHA on the key-paste step. Spec'd in PRD §14.6 HC5.
